note: seq=20 (PLACEHOLDER -- publish session local_713c255c: confirm last_seq+1 on the flat queue, renumber seq + this filename + the sha-note if the queue moved, assign next-free seq, sign, push). ATLAS OUTCOME INGESTER -- the missing outcome signal for the Smart Brain. Fetches the WordPress-published aggregate funnel JSON (status/wp/tnc-outcomes.json -- demo_opened/chatted/lead_captured/converted per source+industry) and UPSERTs it into atlas.outcome_stats (path=industry), the exact table seq-13 atlas_smart_brain.py reads for EV ranking. Before this, outcome_stats was empty and the OutcomeFeedbackRanker sat at the neutral FIFO prior (learning_state=neutral_fifo_needs_live_outcomes); this is what flips it to learned. SCOPE: writes ONLY atlas.outcome_stats via additive idempotent UPSERT (bounced preserved -- owned by the email lane). No schema ALTER, no other table touched, no new inbound port (reverse of seq-15 metrics export -- box pulls a static raw.githubusercontent.com JSON; WordPress holds no DB creds). HETZNER-ONLY single decision layer. Every cmd anchors on /opt/atlas/ for the v4 run_allowlisted anchor.

steps.note: seq=20: ATLAS outcome ingester (fetch WP outcomes JSON -> UPSERT atlas.outcome_stats path=industry; feeds the Smart Brain EV per source+industry)

steps.content:
[Unit]
Description=ATLAS outcome ingester (TuaniChat demo/chat funnel -> atlas.outcome_stats; feeds the Smart Brain EV per source+industry)
Documentation=https://github.com/cloudwalker171/atlas-manifests
After=network-online.target postgresql.service
Wants=network-online.target

[Service]
Type=oneshot
Nice=10
IOSchedulingClass=idle
EnvironmentFile=-/etc/atlas/db.env
EnvironmentFile=-/etc/atlas/autopull.env
Environment=ATLAS_DB_ENV=/etc/atlas/db.env
Environment=ATLAS_AUTOPULL_CONF=/etc/atlas/autopull.env
ExecStart=/opt/atlas/venv/bin/python /opt/atlas/importers/atlas_outcome_ingest.py
TimeoutStartSec=10min

[Unit]
Description=ATLAS outcome ingester -- pull TuaniChat funnel outcomes into the brain every 15 min

[Timer]
OnBootSec=3min
OnUnitActiveSec=15min
Persistent=true
Unit=atlas-outcome-ingest.service

[Install]
WantedBy=timers.target

steps.cmd: /opt/atlas/venv/bin/python -c "import hashlib,sys; w={'/opt/atlas/importers/atlas_outcome_ingest.py':'b7f99573a1f64d8f089e4242dc88f8c20c6f35133e7ef846d66755f6d3bcfed9'}; [sys.exit('SHA MISMATCH '+p) for p,h in w.items() if hashlib.sha256(open(p,'rb').read()).hexdigest()!=h]; print('sha ok')"
